요나 2:1.content: Then Jonah prayed to Yahweh, his God, out of the fish’s belly.

요나 2:2.content: He said, “I called because of my affliction to Yahweh. He answered me. Out of the belly of Sheol I cried. You heard my voice.

요나 2:3.content: For you threw me into the depths, in the heart of the seas. The flood was all around me. All your waves and your billows passed over me.

요나 2:4.content: I said, ‘I have been banished from your sight; yet I will look again toward your holy temple.’

요나 2:5.content: The waters surrounded me, even to the soul. The deep was around me. The weeds were wrapped around my head.

요나 2:6.content: I went down to the bottoms of the mountains. The earth barred me in forever: yet have you brought up my life from the pit, Yahweh my God.

요나 2:7.content: “When my soul fainted within me, I remembered Yahweh. My prayer came in to you, into your holy temple.

요나 2:8.content: Those who regard lying vanities forsake their own mercy.

요나 2:9.content: But I will sacrifice to you with the voice of thanksgiving. I will pay that which I have vowed. Salvation belongs to Yahweh.”

요나 2:10.content: Then Yahweh spoke to the fish, and it vomited out Jonah on the dry land.
